title: admin-overview
body:
Admin Dashboard Overview
As an admin, you have full access to every collection, global, and configuration option in the PATHS platform. The Payload CMS admin panel is your central hub for managing users, content, billing, AI features, and platform settings.

title: ai-configuration
body:
AI Configuration
PATHS integrates AI throughout the platform — from semantic search and content recommendations to the interactive AI tutor. All AI settings are managed through the AI Config global in the admin panel.

title: content-pillars
body:
Content Pillar Configuration
Content pillars are the top-level categories that organize all educational content on PATHS. They provide structure for both the admin panel and the learner-facing frontend.

title: managing-courses

Course Structure

title: managing-tenants
body:
Managing Tenants (Organizations)
PATHS supports multi-tenancy for B2B clients. Each tenant represents an organization — such as a hospital, hotel chain, or corporate wellness program — whose members access content scoped to that organization.
How Multi-Tenancy Works

title: managing-tiers
body:
Managing Membership Tiers
Membership tiers control which content users can access. Each tier represents a level of access, and tiers are linked to Stripe prices for automated billing.
Tier Hierarchy
PATHS ships with four default tiers, seeded via the foundation seed:

title: managing-users
body:
Managing Users & Roles
The Users collection is central to the PATHS platform. As an admin, you control who can access the platform, what role they hold, and which membership tier they belong to.

PATHS uses five roles, each with increasing permissions:
| Role | Permissions |

title: seeding-content
body:

title: site-settings
body:
Site Settings
The Site Settings global contains platform-wide configuration that affects how PATHS presents itself to users and search engines.

Navigate to Globals in the admin sidebar and select Site Settings. This global is accessible only to admins.

title: stripe-billing
body:
Stripe & Billing Setup
PATHS uses a custom Stripe SDK integration for subscription billing. When users subscribe to a paid tier, Stripe handles payment processing and notifies PATHS via webhooks to update the user's membership tier automatically.

Archiving is how you remove outdated or irrelevant content from active circulation without breaking existing links. It is a graceful retirement, not a deletion.
When to Archive
